name: Crab and Cream Cheese Hors D'oeuvre
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except almonds in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the chopped onions, horseradish, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture to a shallow baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the slivered almonds evenly over the top of the cream cheese mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15-20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
6. Serve hot on crackers. Makes approximately 2 cups.
